plugin_desc: PacketLight optical transmission SNMP child template (enterprise PEN 4515). The verified profile is a clean baseline built on standard MIB-II and IF-MIB ifXTable; no stable vendor-specific row-filter-free device-health gauges are confirmed for optical link, transponder, amplifier, temperature or power. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json. The shared Transmission SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate traffic while this plugin provides the PacketLight collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template. Supported brands/models — PacketLight DWDM, OTN and optical transmission devices.
name: Transmission
